Follow The Fool's leap of faith.
A new lucky adventure awaits.

The Magician's power is in your hands.
Today you have the luck to turn ideas into reality.

The deep intuition of The High Priestess is guiding you.
Listen quietly to your inner voice.

The abundance of The Empress nourishes you.
What you focus on cultivating will thrive.
The decisiveness of The Emperor is in your hands, take control with clear plans and discipline.

The wisdom of The Hierophant is within you.
An inner belief or principle will clarify your doubts.
The Lovers bless you with wholeness. Your truth leads to harmony.

The Chariot's will to move forward.
Has paved your path to victory today.
he calm of Strength comes from within; gentle firmness can resolve any challenge.
The Hermit's lantern lights your way. Quiet thought alone will bring precious answers.
The Wheel of Fortune turns to you; actively embracing change ushers in an upward cycle.

The Justice scales balance for you today.
Your past efforts and choices will receive a fair echo.
The Hanged Man's wait is wise. Your new view reveals fresh opportunities.
The transformative power of Death is active; your proactive change welcomes a vibrant new beginning.
Temperance blends all things. Today's calm and patience will create perfect balance.
The Devil's illusion fades. You have the power to choose freedom.
The upheaval of The Tower breaks deadlocks; you can build a firmer foundation.
The Star shines with hope. Move forward with faith, and the universe will guide you.
Walk through The Moon's mist. Your courage will turn vague fears into clear chances.
The Sun shines bright. Today is full of energy, success, and simple joy.
Judgment is a clear call. It awakens new strength within you.

The World crowns you.
A cycle completes, bringing joyful success and celebration.

Stay open; the unknown brings gifts.
   — The Fool

Use all you command to create wonders.
   — The Magician

Trust the first voice of your intuition.
   — The High Priestess

Generosity and nurture bring abundance today.
   — The Empress

A clear plan brings solid control.
   — The Emperor

Traditional ways or a mentor offer reliable guidance.
   — The Hierophant

When choosing, listen to your heart.
   — The Lovers

Steer your course with will and advance.
   — The Chariot
rue strength comes from gentle confidence. —The Strength

n quiet self-exploration, you will gain clear guidance.
   — The Hermit

A fortunate turn is happening; be ready to welcome opportunities.
   — The Wheel of Fortune
Your efforts will be justly rewarded. —The Justice

Pause, and you'll gain a new perspective.
   — The Hanged Man
An ending means a brand new start. —The Death
Find perfect rhythm in blending and balance. —The Temperance

See the temptation, and you claim your power.
   — The Devil

Break through old patterns, and you will build a more solid foundation.
   — The Tower

Hold hope, with inspiration and healing.
   — The Star

Trust the whisper of your intuition; it will guide you safely.
   — The Moon

Take positive action for joy and recognition.
   — The Sun

Make a wise judgment, and you will welcome a brand new beginning.
   — Judgement

You are about to complete an important phase flawlessly.
   — The World
Power of the Day — The Sun: Your vitality can illuminate everything.
Insight of the Day — Wheel of Fortune: Go with the flow, and good things will happen.
Insight of the Day — Nine of Cups: The wish you made is coming true.
Insight of the Day — Ten of Cups: Harmony and fulfillment will fill your life.
Power of the Day — Six of Wands: Move forward with confidence; honor follows.
Power of the Day — The Star: You are gently supported by the universe.
Power of the Day — Ten of Pentacles: Enjoy prosperity and share the fruits.
Insight of the Day — The World: Success and achievement are already in your hands.

Every day is a new opportunity.
—— George Herbert

Always look on the bright side of life.
—— Richard Branson

The happiness of your life depends on the quality of your thoughts.
—— Marcus Aurelius

A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
—— Lao Tzu

The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
—— Eleanor Roosevelt

To live is to change, and to be perfect is to have changed often.
—— John Henry Newman

The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live.
—— Auguste Rodin

You must do the thing you think you cannot do.
—— Eleanor Roosevelt

Once you choose hope, anything's possible.
—— Christopher Reeve

Tough times never last, but tough people do.
—— Robert H. Schuller

Cease to struggle and you cease to live.
—— Thomas Carlyle

Living without an aim is like sailing without a compass.
—— Alexandre Dumas

We acquire the strength we have overcome.
—— Ralph Waldo Emerson

Why do the stars shine? Perhaps so that each of us may one day find our own.
—— Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

Hope is the thing with feathers that perches in the soul.
—— Emily Dickinson

If you are a light to yourself, you will light up the world.
—— Mother Teresa

Change your thoughts and you change your world.
—— Norman Vincent Peale

The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
—— Alan Kay

Rise up, be enlightened, and go forward.
—— Aesop's Fables

The joy is in the journey, not the destination.
—— Carl Lewis

Joy is not in things; it is in us.
—— Richard Wagner

The fun is hidden in the process of seeking.
—— Chinese Proverb

All you need is faith, trust, and a little bit of pixie dust.
—— Peter Pan

Storms make trees take deeper roots.
—— Darlo Jandron

Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
—— Oscar Wilde
Logic will get you from A to B. Imagination will take you everywhere.—— Albert Einstein

A thing of beauty is a joy forever.
—— John Keats

The best way out is always through.
—— Robert Frost

Happiness is a journey, not a destination.
—— Ben Sweetland

You are braver than you believe.
—— A. A. Milne

A person who walks slowly, as long as he does not lose his goal, walks faster than one who wanders aimlessly.
—— Gotthold Ephraim Lessing
Listen to the wind, it knows everything.

Within you there is a stillness and a sanctuary to which you can retreat at any time and be yourself.
—— Hermann Hesse
Let the game ease your mind and make the bed for sweet dreams.
The space reserved for fun is also the place reserved for sleep and wisdom.
Play 7 days in a row for max bonus!
